meta-description: Learn about large group health plans by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Large group health plan
excerpt: In general, a group health plan that covers employees of an employer that has 51 or more employees. In some states large groups are defined as 101 or more.
content: In general, a group health plan that covers employees of an employer that has 51 or more employees. In some states large groups are defined as 101 or more.
